successful_cues.cue: When user asks to pay now, send payment link right after dues explanation.
sample_signals: payment_intent: customer asked for immediate payment link

unsuccessful_cues.cue: Hard push fails when hardship is not acknowledged before options are discussed.
sample_signals: hardship_signal: cannot pay this month due to job loss

unsuccessful_cues.cue: User asked for discount/waiver style assistance.
sample_signals: user: I need lower EMI | agent: I can propose discount plan | user: Bye
